description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 2 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 57 mins. His work was split mostly across Java (50%), Bash (25%), and Markdown (14%), across 4 projects. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repos are listed for the week.
